settings.subtitle: Crafted With Precision
settings.title: Where Art Meets Thread
settings.description: Premium computerized embroidery on handpicked fabrics. Each piece is a wearable work of art.

settings.subtitle: Our Craft
settings.title: Precision in Every Thread
settings.text:
We combine cutting-edge computerized embroidery technology with artisan design sensibility. Each piece undergoes meticulous quality checks to ensure the stitching is flawless and the fabric feels premium against your skin.

From concept to finished garment, every step is handled with care — because we believe what you wear should be as intentional as how you live.

settings.subtitle: The Detail
settings.title: Embroidery Up Close
settings.text: Our computerized embroidery machines run at over 1,000 stitches per minute with pinpoint accuracy. The result? Designs that look hand-crafted but with a consistency and precision that only technology can deliver.
The embroidery quality is insane. You can feel the craftsmanship the moment you hold the tee.
settings.author: Rahul S.

settings.text: Ordered two oversized tees. The stitching detail is next level and the fabric feels premium. Worth every rupee.
settings.author: Priya M.

settings.text: Finally a brand that does embroidery right. Clean designs, great fit, and fast delivery. My new go-to.
settings.author: Arjun K.

settings.title: Join the Thread
settings.text: Subscribe for early access to new drops, exclusive offers, and behind-the-scenes looks at our embroidery process.
